description_long: This is a modern, geometric shelving unit with a distinctive stepped design, featuring three open rectangular compartments of varying sizes. The structure is composed of flat, straight panels with sharp right angles, giving it a minimalist and contemporary appearance. The shelves are arranged asymmetrically, with the top and bottom compartments offset from the central vertical support, creating a visually interesting profile. The material appears to be a solid, matte-finished wood or wood composite, uniformly colored in a medium brown tone. The open design allows for easy access from the front and sides, making it suitable for displaying or storing items in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or public spaces. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, emphasizing its open and accessible nature.
description: A modern, stepped brown shelving unit with three open rectangular compartments and a minimalist, geometric design. The structure is made of solid panels with a matte finish and no visible doors or handles.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stepped profile and depth of the three open compartments.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the open faces of all three shelves and the central vertical support.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the offset arrangement of the shelves and the solid side panels.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the shelves and the continuous vertical support structure.
